Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-2369 affecting package libsoup for versions less than 3.4.4-14
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-2369 affecting package libsoup for versions less than 3.4.4-14. A patched version of the package is available.

Criterion.Comment: Package libsoup is earlier than 3.4.4-14, affected by CVE-2026-2369
